TOS / ODP BEV Simulator Ego RoadRadius = Vx / YawRate false-detection review frame 000

Scenario Concept

The real road does not have a perfectly constant radius. Ego path prediction, however, is drawn from the current R = Vx / yawrate. In a steady corner with dense adjacent-lane traffic, far-side vehicles can appear inside the ego RoadRadius corridor and become false target candidates.

Replay Status

Vx--km/h
YawRate--rad/s
R=Vx/yaw--m
False candidateNONEtrack overlap

Control

Actual road lanes: varying curvature Ego RoadRadius corridor: constant R from Vx/yawrate Track inside ego R corridor → False Detection

Object Tracks

IDRoad LaneDecision
